title: Ipmi_Capabilities_SupportedAuthTypes
description: Ipmi_Capabilities_SupportedAuthTypes schema from Asset Graph API

extended.description: If true, the extended capabilities are present.

md2.description: True if the MD2 AuthType is supported.

md5.description: True if the MD5 AuthType is supported.

none.description: True if the None AuthType is supported.

oem_proprietary.description: True if the OEM Proprietary AuthType is supported

password.description: True if the Password AuthType is supported.

raw.description: The raw byte, with the bit mask etc
